_comment: Known topic labels the classifier can attach to a chat message. Unlike `project` (exactly ONE primary tag per row, from projects.json), a row may carry SEVERAL labels — the whole set is sent to the LLM, which picks the most appropriate ones (primary first) and may invent a new lowercase-kebab slug when nothing fits. New slugs are auto-appended here. Keep names stable — search filters on them. These are EXAMPLE labels — replace them with your own.

labels.hint: customer quotes, pricing, product questions, order follow-ups
the core product/hardware: features, specs, behavior
email knowledge-base extraction, contacts DB, follow-up checks
the chat bot: gateway, streaming, file ingest, message queue
the chat/message archive + recall system and its classifier
invoices, POs, payments, pricing math, accounting
cross-cutting theme: whether/where data leaves the box, on-prem vs cloud
cross-cutting theme: speed, latency, cost, resource use
greetings, status checks, meta — fits no specific topic
